overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic urban environment. The character travels along an elevated sidewalk past the Militech building and large digital billboards, transitioning from bright sunlight into a dark covered walkway beneath a highway overpass.

events.description: camera moves from highway overview to third-person walking perspective on sidewalk
pedestrian in red top passes close to camera, temporarily blocking view

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily along the elevated sidewalk next to highway guardrail

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red top and white shorts walking toward camera and passing by at close range

entered.detail: large dark corporate building with MILITECH signage visible on facade
metal guardrail separating pedestrian sidewalk from elevated highway lanes
multi-lane elevated highway structure with moving vehicle traffic
tall vertical digital advertisement screen on distant building

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of the Militech building dominating the left side as the character walks along an elevated sidewalk. Bright midday sun illuminates the scene. A pedestrian in a red top passes close by around the 11-second mark. The highway guardrail runs along the left with traffic visible on the elevated deck.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with massive digital advertisements

events.description: crowd density increases as multiple pedestrians appear walking in same direction
approaching shadow of highway overpass, sunlight begins to dim significantly

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past large digital billboards and increasing pedestrian traffic

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with blue backpack walking ahead at steady pace
child in striped shirt walking alongside the main character

entered.detail: massive curved digital screen displaying colorful advertisements on building facade
tall skyscraper with reflective glass windows rising above street level
elevated walkway bridge connecting buildings across the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks past the Militech building and enters a commercial zone dominated by massive curved digital billboards on the left. Pedestrian traffic increases with several people walking in the same direction. Modern glass towers rise on the right. Around 40 seconds, the lighting begins to change as the character approaches the shadow of an overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under highway overpass

events.description: enters dark covered walkway beneath highway overpass, transitioning from bright sun to shadow

agents.ego_description: walking into the dark covered corridor beneath the highway overpass

notable_agents.action: silhouetted figure walking ahead in the dimly lit corridor

entered.detail: underside of highway overpass forming a roof over the pedestrian walkway
massive cylindrical concrete column supporting the highway structure above
solid concrete wall with metal railings separating walkway from lower street levels

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dark, covered walkway beneath the highway overpass, with the concrete ceiling and support pillars dominating the view. Natural light fades to low artificial lighting. The space is enclosed with concrete walls on the left and pillars on the right. Traffic is visible through gaps in the structure as the character continues walking toward the distant exit light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along an elevated urban sidewalk that transitions from a bright, sun-drenched plaza into a dark, enclosed underpass. It begins with the Militech building dominating the left side under a brilliant midday sun, moving past a highway guardrail and a pedestrian in a red top. As the character advances, the scene opens into a commercial zone where massive curved digital billboards and glass towers replace the corporate architecture and pedestrian traffic increases. The lighting then shifts from bright daylight to deep shadow as the camera approaches the looming silhouette of a highway overpass. Finally, the environment closes in as the character enters a dark, covered walkway defined by concrete pillars and artificial light, moving toward a distant exit while traffic remains visible through the gaps in the structure.
